summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of SDPS Student Council Election app. All 16 backend pytest cases passed (auth, students, candidates, votes, stats, candidate CRUD, Excel upload). Frontend kiosk flow validated via Playwright: AuthPage -> ConfirmPage (correct student details) -> VotePage (5 sequential posts, candidate cards render with photo/name/symbol, progress bar updates, Submit Ballot button on post 5/5). Admin login + dashboard tabs verified.

issues: Heading 'Is this you?' uses very light gray color - low contrast against white-blue gradient background; visually faded

action_items: (Optional polish) Improve heading contrast on ConfirmPage - currently appears very light
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') - should migrate to lifespan context manager
JWT_SECRET has insecure default fallback in code; OK for dev but ensure JWT_SECRET env var is set in production
POST /api/admin/students/upload has no file size/type validation before parsing - could be hardened
DELETE /api/admin/students/{admission_no} does not also remove associated votes - orphan votes possible if a student is deleted after voting (low risk for kiosk flow)
All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id, use /api prefix, async motor calls, and Pydantic validation - good

success_rate.frontend: 100% on flows tested (kiosk auth->confirm->5-post vote, admin login + tabs)

test_credentials: Admin: Aarav / Krish@2026; Students SDPS001-SDPS008. Note: SDPS003 and SDPS007 were used in tests and are now in 'voted' state in DB.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest casted vote for SDPS007 (full ballot) so admin stats has live data. Test candidates and TEST_S100/TEST_S101 students were created and cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass. Voting students SDPS003 (via partial frontend run) and SDPS007 (via backend test) may already be in voted state - use SDPS004/005/006/008 for fresh kiosk runs. The frontend Submit button on the final post is labeled 'Submit Ballot' (not 'Submit'); include 'submit ballot' / 'finish' / 'cast' in any text matchers. data-testid coverage on candidate cards uses prefix 'candidate-card'. The 'Yes, that's me' confirm button can be matched by text.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Flow works end-to-end.
